findings.note: 12 cuts covering 86s. Hard cut between scenes; slow_dissolve only at sc11->sc12 (return-to-distance). Open fade-from-black, close fade-to-black. Disciplined transition vocabulary.
7 overlays: 1 opening supertitle + 5 specimen lower thirds + 1 closing supertitle. Lower thirds use the new SpecimenLowerThird Remotion component (IBM Plex Sans, navy + red accent).
Audio: narration @ 1.0 over music @ 0.08 with -8dB sidechain duck. fade_in 1.5s, fade_out 2.5s on music.
Subtitles disabled in v1 (would compete with bureaucratic lower thirds); .srt asset still present for re-enable.

render_runtime confirmed 'remotion' (matches proposal); renderer_family corrected from 'documentary-montage' to 'explainer-data' with logged decision (Explainer composition is where SpecimenLowerThird is registered; CinematicRenderer uses a different overlay vocabulary).
